arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPC Lattice service network.

auth_type.description: The type of authentication used by the VPC Lattice service network.

created_at.description: The timestamp indicating when the VPC Lattice service network was created.

id.description: The unique identifier of the VPC Lattice service network.

last_updated_at.description: The timestamp indicating the last time the VPC Lattice service network was updated.

name.description: The name of the VPC Lattice service network.

number_of_associated_services.description: The number of services associated with the VPC Lattice service network.

number_of_associated_vpcs.description: The number of VPCs associated with the VPC Lattice service network.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the VPC Lattice service network.
